title: AILAB Entity Relation
description: One directed relation edge between two entities (one line of entity_relations.jsonl). Optional sidecar. Primary purpose: Vietnamese address/pronoun resolution (how the pair address each other and refer to themselves). Convention: source_entity IS the relation_type of target_entity (e.g. relation_type='parent' => source is the parent of target). A relation may be phased over the document via optional state_label + valid_from_block_id + valid_to_block_id; absent phase fields mean the relation applies to the whole document. Block ranges are compared by document order (order_index), not by string. Mirrors DATASET_DESIGN.md section 5.3b.

address_term_pair.description: How the speaking side refers to itself (self_term) and addresses the other side (address_term).

relation_type.description: Free-text with recommended values: sibling, parent, child, spouse, lover, friend, close_friend, master, servant, mentor, stranger, rival, enemy, betrayed_friend, creator_creation, guardian. Not a closed enum.

state_label.description: Optional phase label, e.g. before_betrayal / after_betrayal.

valid_from_block_id.description: Block where this phase starts (by document order). null/absent = from document start.

valid_to_block_id.description: Block where this phase ends. null/absent = open / to document end.

trigger_event_id.description: Free-text label for the turning-point event (no referential target in 1.5.0; AI-LAB has no events file).
